options.content: Ethereum Arbitrum Base BNB Hyperliquid Monad Solana TON
Global US West EU Asia

#### Description

This dashboard provides real-time and historical performance analytics for RPC nodes across major providers.

* Click region buttons to view metrics from different locations
* Adjust time range for historical analysis
* Hover over info icons for detailed metric descriptions

 

#### Data collection

Response times are measured by our Python service on [Vercel serverless functions](https://github.com/chainstacklabs/compare-dashboard-functions), sending requests every 1-3 minutes from three regions.

Response times exceeding 55 seconds are considered failures and excluded from charts.

All requests use latest blocks except "archive" methods (⌛), which query historical blocks (1-2 days ago).

ℹ️ If not specified, the first paid RPC provider plan (named Growth as a rule) is used for monitoring.

 

#### How we rank providers

We evaluate RPC providers based on their **speed** (response time) and **reliability** (success rate) across three regions.

* The **lower** the score, the **better** the provider
* Even small success rate drops (99% vs 97%) significantly impact the final score
* Performance is measured equally across all regions

```plaintext
Score = 1 / ((1/ResponseTime) × (SuccessRate³))
```

panels.description:
We evaluate RPC providers based on their speed (response time) and reliability (success rate) across three regions.

Score = 1 / ((1/ResponseTime) × (SuccessRate³))
panels.title: Provider score (lower is better)
What is the p95 response time and overall success rate?

panels.description: p95 response time across all metrics per provider, segmented by request origin region.
panels.title: By data collection region

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
(
  sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
  or on(provider, source_region)
  (0 * sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region))
)
/
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Success rate

panels.description: p95 response time per API method for each provider, aggregated across all regions. Block timestamp delay in eth_subscribe("newHeads")  represents the difference between block timestamp and its reception time.
panels.title: By API method
What is the p95 response time in each region?

panels.description: p95 response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.
p95 response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.
p95 response time per provider-region pair, showing response times between each collection location and provider endpoint.

Each row is a provider, aggregated across regions by worst region at each moment (most behind = shown). Lag is relative to the best provider in the same region. Color shows severity: green = at tip (≤2 blocks), yellow = slightly behind (3-10), orange = behind (10-20), red = significantly behind (>20), grey = no data.

targets.expr: max by (provider) (-1 * (max by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="Arbitrum", response_status="success"}) - on(source_region) group_left max by (source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="Arbitrum", response_status="success"})))

panels.title: Block lag timeline

panels.description: Block lag tracking summary, aggregated across regions (weighted). % at Tip = share of region×minute samples where provider's lag ≤ 2 blocks vs best-in-region tip. SR = overall RPC success rate across all regional samples.

targets.expr: 100 * (1 - avg_over_time((avg by (provider) (clamp_min(-1 * (max by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="Arbitrum", response_status="success"}) - on(source_region) group_left max by (source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="block_number", blockchain="Arbitrum", response_status="success"})), 0) > bool 2))[$__range:1m]))

sum by (provider) (
  count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum", response_status="success"}[$__range])
  or on(provider, source_region)
  (0 * count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum"}[$__range]))
)
/
sum by (provider) (count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Block lag summary
Provider agreement
panels.description: Per provider, did this provider's answer match the majority answer in every region it participated in at this moment. Green - matched the majority everywhere. Red - was an outlier in at least one region. Grey - no data captured.

panels.title: Agreement summary
panels.description: For each provider in each region, the percentage of samples this provider returned that matched the majority answer for the same block, over the chosen time range. 100% means always agreed with the majority. Sorted highest first.
Historical response time per provider-region pair, showing trends in eth_call requests.

targets.expr: sum by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum", api_method="eth_call", response_status="success"})

panels.title: eth_call

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum", api_method="eth_call", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum", api_method="eth_call"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)

panels.title: Success rate

panels.description: Historical response time per provider-region pair, showing trends in eth_getBalance requests.

targets.expr: sum by (provider, source_region) (response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum", api_method="eth_getBalance", response_status="success"} >= 0)

panels.title: eth_getBalance ⌛

panels.description: Success rate of requests where response has 200 status code and contains no error field in JSON RPC response.

targets.expr:
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum", api_method="eth_getBalance", response_status="success"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
/
sum(count_over_time(response_latency_seconds{metric_type="response_time", blockchain="Arbitrum", api_method="eth_getBalance"}[$__range])) by (provider, source_region)
